name: Add type annotations to an unchanged function
description: A purely additive, safe change: adds type hints to a function whose body and behaviour are unchanged. A disciplined review should LGTM this.
diff:
--- a/utils.py
+++ b/utils.py
@@ -3,4 +3,4 @@
-def compute_total(items):
+def compute_total(items: list[int]) -> int:
     """Return the sum of all items."""
     return sum(items)
